title: Hand Sanitiser Gel - Unscented and Alcohol-Free Hand Sanitising Formula - Great for Schools, Hospitals, Home & Office - Manufactured in the UK - 5 Litre Hand Sanitizer Pack of 1
features: GENTLY AND EFFECTIVELY CLEANS HANDS: Serenity Hygiene's convenient and effective hand gel sanitizer, terrific for your home, place of business, or virtually anywhere. Our alcohol free gel hand sanitizer is trusted by hospitals, emergency services, and care homes to get the job done each and every time. Safeguard you, your family, and/or your customers with a gel hand sanitizer that blends safety and effectiveness in one!

ZERO ALCOHOL FORMULA: Forget about your run-of-the-mill hand sanitizing gel that relies on harsh and overpowering alcohol for its effectiveness - Our alcohol free hand sanitizer doesn't have the overwhelmingly strong scent and roughness of alcohol that's so commonly found in competitor products. Our gentle gel hand sanitizer is ideal for those with sensitive skin, children, and the elderly alike.

GREAT VALUE: Each gel sanitizer pump bottle delivers at least double the uses of an alcohol gel . Our advanced formula comes ready to sanitise your hands anywhere. The premium alcohol-free formula of our sanitizer gel provides superior performance and tested to far greater effectiveness than competing produtcs. Our alcohol free gel hand sanitizer is great for hospitals, care homes, schools, or your own home!

TRAVEL FRIENDLY: An exceptional travel hand sanitiser that is ultra portable so that you can safely and effectively clean your hands while you're on the go or while traveling. Safe for use in planes and airports, It's great to keep in your car, in your hotel room, or anywhere!
ULTRA EFFICIENT: Alcohol free hand gel does not evaporate so only use a pea sized amount at a time. Lasts many times longer than traditional gel
description: Product Description Alcohol Free Skin Safe Hand Gel Tested to independent standards to destroy viruses, fungus and bacteria including norovirus which alcohol sanitisers are ineffective against. Trusted by Schools Join the hundreds of schools across the UK that trust Serenity hand sanitiser to reduce infection in the classroom. Powerful Antimicrobial Action Independently tested to destroy bacteria , viruses and fungus including norovirus and resistant pathogens that alcohol products are ineffective against Used in the NHS Medical grade hand sanitiser that eliminates hospital transmitted pathogens such as MRSA and C.Diff within seconds. Manufactured in UK Under ISO 9001 Conditions Serenity Hygiene brings the most effective hygiene & cleaning products to our customers while ensuring the highest ethical standards. We began our journey developing advanced sanitation liquids for use in the medical waste sector, where effective pathogen control was critical and discovered that being effective against germs and being green was not mutually exclusive. First to promote alcohol-free hand sanitizer Excellence & a commitment to quality Variety of advanced products Why choose Serenity Hygiene? Safe, effective and no harsh chemicals Our sanitiser formula contains no alcohol or harsh chemicals, will not dry out or crack skin and is far superior at destroying germs than any alcohol product. Perfect for kids or those with sensitive skin and available in a variety of wonderful scents. Alcohol Free - Skin and pet safe Hospital Grade - Tested to destroy dozens of germs Highly efficient, use less than half of what you'd use with alcohol gel Refillable Bottle - Save plastic waste and refill when empty Vegan Friendly & Cruelty Free Unscented Sanitiser Hand Gel Sanitiser Winter Spice Sanitiser White Lotus & Seagrass Sanitiser Mint & Eucalyptus Sanitiser Rhubarb & Custard Sanitiser Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 89 4.0 out of 5 stars 256 4.5 out of 5 stars 34 4.3 out of 5 stars 21 4.8 out of 5 stars 42 4.3 out of 5 stars 24 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £8.49 £ 8 . 49 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 Alcohol Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Antibacterial ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Anti Viral ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Scented no data no data ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Made in UK ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
